Metadata.title: Istiqtab — Set up in Morocco. Fast, clear, confident.
Metadata.description: Morocco's first AI-powered FDI facilitation platform. Navigate company setup, calculate incentives, and find verified local partners.

Auth.name: Full name
Auth.verifyEmailSent: A verification link has been sent to {email}
Auth.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters

hero.headline: Set up in Morocco.
hero.body: Morocco attracted MAD 43.2 billion in FDI in 2024 — up 24.7%. Navigate company formation, investment incentives, and local partnerships with Morocco's first AI-powered investment platform.

sectors.title: Your sector. Your incentives.
sectors.subtitle: Morocco's Investment Charter 2022 offers up to 5 years of corporate tax exemption, customs duty waivers, and land subsidies across 14 sectors.

Calculator.title: Investment Incentives Calculator
Calculator.subtitle: Enter your project details to calculate applicable incentives from Morocco's Investment Charter 2022.
Calculator.disclaimer: Results are indicative only, based on publicly available Charter data. For binding confirmation, consult your CRI or a qualified advisor.

Partners.directorySubtitle: Law firms, tax advisors, recruiters, real estate and logistics partners — vetted to support international investors setting up in Morocco.
Partners.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No partners found} one {# partner} other {# partners}}
Partners.noResults: No partners match your filters. Try widening your search.
Partners.profileRequired: Complete your investor profile to request an introduction.
Partners.requestPlaceholder: Briefly describe your project and what you'd like help with…
Partners.requestSuccess: Your request has been sent. Our team will review it and broker the introduction.
Partners.requestMediation: Istiqtab reviews every request and mediates the introduction — your details are never shared without an admin's review.
Partners.myIntroductionsSubtitle: Track the status of your partner introduction requests.
Partners.noIntroductions: You haven't requested any introductions yet.
Partners.adminSubtitle: Review and broker investor introductions to verified partners.

Errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.
Errors.notFound: The requested resource was not found.
Errors.validation: Please check your input and try again.

Experts.directorySubtitle: Investment lawyers, tax advisors and sector specialists — vetted to guide your setup in Morocco. Book a 30 or 60-minute session.
Experts.resultCount: {count, plural, =0 {No experts found} one {# expert} other {# experts}}
Experts.noResults: No experts match your filters. Try widening your search.
Experts.profileRequired: Complete your investor profile to book a session.
Experts.bookSuccess: Your session is confirmed. A meeting link is on your My Sessions page.
Experts.noSlots: This expert has no open slots right now. Check back soon.
Experts.bookingNote: No payment is taken on Istiqtab in v0.1 — the expert invoices you directly. A video meeting link is issued on confirmation.

Bookings.title: My sessions
Bookings.subtitle: Your booked expert consultations and meeting links.
Bookings.empty: You have no booked sessions yet.

Sessions.availabilitySubtitle: Add the time slots investors can book. Times are in UTC.
Sessions.noSlots: No availability yet. Add your first slot above.
Sessions.bookingsSubtitle: Sessions investors have booked with you.
Sessions.noProfile: Create your expert profile before managing availability.

Advisor.title: Ask Istiqtab
Advisor.subtitle: Your 24/7 AI investment advisor. Ask about company setup, legal forms, incentives, or which region fits your project — answers are tailored to your profile.
Advisor.placeholder: Ask about setting up in Morocco…
Advisor.empty: Ask your first question — for example, “What's the minimum capital for a SARL?”
Advisor.disclaimer: Informational only — not financial, legal, or tax advice. Verify with your CRI or a qualified advisor.

Hub.title: Investment Intelligence Hub
Hub.subtitle: Research Morocco's sectors, regional investment centres, and regulatory landscape before you invest.
Hub.sectorsSubtitle: In-depth guides covering incentives, key players, and setup requirements across Morocco's priority sectors.
Hub.regionsSubtitle: Compare Morocco's 12 regions — infrastructure, incentives, sector strengths, and CRI contacts.

sectorGuide.disclaimer: Sector data is based on publicly available information. Verify specifics with your CRI or a qualified advisor.
